FND_APM_BRANCHES.description: This table stores APM Deploy branches information

FND_APM_BUILD_DEP_REPOS.description: This table contains the list of dependent repositories for apm build objects.

FND_APPL_TAXONOMY_HIERARCHY.description: Table for storing taxonomy module parent-child relationships.

FND_APPL_TAXONOMY_RF.description: Taxonomy Row Flattening table required for Applcore Setup Admin UIs.

FND_APPROVALS_INGEST_ERROR.description: Stores task information for Approvals V2 ingestion for tasks that have errored and need to be retried.

FND_APPROVALS_INGEST_STATUS.description: Used to store the status and related metadata for the Approvals Ingestion jobs: Scheduler, Worker and Sync.

FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS_TL.description:
Translation table for FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS.
This table is not currently used.

FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS_TL_.description:
This table contains the audit trail for updates made to the FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS_TL table.
This table is not currently used.

FND_AUDIT_ATTRIBUTES.description: This table will store the attributes enabled for Auditing.

FND_AUDIT_BOSS_USAGES.description: This table contains the mapping between existing ADF and Business Objects

FND_AUDIT_USER_TABLE_ACCESS.description: This table stores the audit history on when a base table was last updated by a particular user. There will be only 1 row per user and table.

FND_AUDIT_WEBAPP_AM.description: This table contains seeded information on what AMs are available in a given webapp for Auditing.

FND_BOSS_AI_INVALID_INVK.description: Invalid prompt invocation information collected during BOSS AI request

FND_BOSS_AI_LLM_INVK.description: Successful prompt LLM invocation information used during a BOSS AI request

FND_BOSS_AI_TELEMETRY.description: Used to store telemetry data related to a BOSS AI request. It contains request information along with target metadata used to fulfill this request.

FND_BOSS_EXMPL_TO_QSTN.description: Table used to relate LLM examples in fnd_boss_llm_examples to natural language questions in fnd_boss_llm_questions

FND_BOSS_HS_FUSION_INDICES.description: BOSS RODS Hybrid Search indexes defined by BOSS metadata.

FND_BOSS_HS_INDEX_DATA.description: BOSS RODS index physical storage information for indexes defined in FND_BOSS_HS_INDICES.

FND_BOSS_HS_INDICES.description: BOSS RODS Hybrid Search indexes state defined by BOSS metadata.

FND_BOSS_LLM_EXAMPLES.description: Table that contains information for ingested LLM example from metadata files.

FND_BOSS_LLM_QUESTIONS.description: Table used to store natural language questions that will be used to match against an LLM example

FND_BOSS_PN_METADATA.description: BOSS proper name index physical storage information for indexes defined in FND_BOSS_PN_METADATA.

FND_BPM_COMPVERSION_INTERFACE.description: Temporary table interface for tracking composite versions per task. It is used by the translation phase of the functionality.

FND_BPM_TASK_BATCH_INTERFACE.description: FND_BPM_TASK_BATCH_INTERFACE This table is just used for batching tasks from the SOAINF schema to the FUSION schema.

FND_CAL_DAY.description: Day Level Table for Gregorian Calendar Time Dimension

FND_CA_DEVICE_DIM.description: This table provide visibility into our users devices and clients, such as device type, browser type, language, operating system, and screen resolution etc.

FND_CA_DEVICE_FACT.description: The device metrics provide visibility into our users devices and clients, such as device type, browser type, operating system, and screen resolution. We capture these at an app level, and count in terms of sessions.

FND_COLUMN_DATASHAPES.description: This table will be used to maintain the Column level Datashape Info for all Fusion Tables and Columns. It will store the current Datashape Info (Actual) which will be automatically populated by a script and also the Target Datashape Info to be populated by the Table Owners based on their requirements. The goal is to match both Target and Actual values.

FND_COMPILED_MENU_FUNCTIONS.description: compiled menu functions stores the compilation of menus/functions

FND_CSM_TBL_BACKUP.description: This table is used to determine the backup table for each base table used for CSM import. This table is used for internal purposes and contains only seeded data. This is used internally by CSM framework and not for external customer use.

FND_DEEP_LINK_LIST.description: This table contains the list of Deep Links created. Most of the deep links in the table are seeded. Some could be created programmatically.  This table is for internal use only.

FND_DF_BOSS_USAGES.description: This table stores the descriptive flexfield BOSS business object usages.

FND_DIAG_EXECUTION.description: Stores information on every invocation of a test.

FND_DIAG_INPUTSET.description: Stores input parameters so that a user can launch the same diagnostic run and reuse the inputs used for a prior run.

FND_DIAG_INPUTSET_NAME_VALUE.description: Stores inputset name - value pairs for reusing the inputset in a later run of the same diagnostics.

FND_DIAG_INPUTSET_TL.description: This table stores translatable attributes such as display name and description for diagnostic test input sets.

FND_DIAG_RUN.description: Stores information on a Diagnostics test run. A Diagnostic run can be launched for any "taxonomy node" and may spawn several diagnostic tests.

FND_DIAG_TAG.description: This table defines tags, used to categorize diagnostic tests in a flexible fashion. TAGs are Module Types in Taxonomy model.

FND_DIAG_TAG_TL.description: Translations table for Tags (Flexible test categories)

FND_DIAG_TAG_VALUE.description: This table defines Tag Value ID's, which is equivalent to Taxonomy's Module ID.

FND_DIAG_TAG_VALUE_HIERARCHY.description: This table stores tag value id hierarchy data

FND_DIAG_TAG_VALUE_PREREQ.description: Defines prerequisites for tag values. A tag value may declare other tag values as prequisites.

FND_DIAG_TAG_VALUE_TEST_ASSOC.description: This table stores assignments of diagnostics tests to various tag value id's (TAG_VALUE_ID's represent "nodes" in the "taxonomy structure")

FND_DIAG_TEST_STATS.description: Captures statistics related to each diagnostic test execution.

These attributes will be exposed as a web service at run time. The caller will obtain the list of used attributes and pass to Oracle Business Rules (OBR) engine to execute the rules of the dictionary.

FND_OBJECT_INSTANCE_SETS.description: Stores the Object Instance Sets that corresponds to an Object. Object Instance Set is nothing but a filter condition used to stripe data. Filter condition can be stored as a predicate or as a Filter XML Document.

FND_OBJECT_INSTANCE_SETS_BK.description: Stores the backup data of Object Instance Sets that corresponds to an Object. Object Instance Set is nothing but a filter condition used to stripe data. Filter condition can be stored as a predicate or as a Filter XML Document.

FND_OBJECT_INSTANCE_SETS_TL.description: Stores the translatable attributes of an Instance Set.

FND_OBJECT_INSTANCE_SETS_TL_.description: Stores the translatable attributes of an Instance Set.

FND_OBJECT_INSTANCE_SETS_TL_BK.description: Stores the backup data translatable attributes of an Instance Set.

FND_PROFILE_HIERARCHY_LEVELS.description: FND_PROFILE_HIERARCHY_LEVELS is used to maintain the profile levels that are applicable.  Currently we only support SITE, PRODUCT, USER.

FND_PROFILE_LEVELS.description: FND_PROFILE_LEVELS allows you to dynamically define all the levels support by the Application.

FND_PROFILE_OPTION_VALUES.description: FND_PROFILE_OPTION_VALUES stores the profile option values for a particiular level value.

FND_PROFILE_OPTION_VALUES_.description: FND_PROFILE_OPTION_VALUES stores the profile option values for a particiular level value.

FND_RAND_STATES.description: This table stores the state information used by the secure pseudo random number generator

FND_RDS_B.description: This table is for stroing Report Delivery Service needed by provisioning

FND_RDS_PILLAR_DATA_USAGE.description: This table is to store RDS and consumer map

FND_RDS_TL.description: This is the translatable table for fnd_rds

FND_RECENT_ITEMS_LIST.description: This table is created to store recent items belonging to the logged in user in fusion apps.

FND_RRA_COUNTRIES.description: This table will store ISO country codes and names

FND_RRA_COUNTRIES_.description: This table will store ISO country codes and names

FND_RRA_CURRENCIES.description: This table will store diffferent currencies

FND_RRA_CURR_CONV_RATES.description: This table will store daily conversion rates between diffferent currencies

FND_RRA_CUSTOMERS.description: This table will store customer details

FND_RRA_CUSTOMER_ADDRESSES.description: This table will store customer addresses details

FND_RRA_PRODUCTS.description: This table will store products details

FND_RRA_PRODUCT_CATEGORIES.description: This table will store product category details

FND_RRA_PROD_CATS.description: This table will store product category details

FND_RRA_STORE_PRODS_.description: This table will store products stocked by the store, also referred to as the store-front inventory

FND_RRA_TRAIN_TASK_RELS.description: This table will store the relationships between training tasks

FND_RRA_USR_TRAIN.description: This table will store the training details for a particular user

FND_SAVED_SEARCH_B.description: The primary table for storing Saved Searches.

FND_SAVED_SEARCH_TL.description: Stores Translatable attributes for Fusion Saved Searches.

FND_SAVED_SEARCH_USER_DFLT.description: This table captures the current default saved search for a user.  This value overrides any defaulting logic based on FND_SAVED_SEARCH_B data.

FND_SAVED_SEARCH_USER_PREFS.description: Table to store the user customizations (preferences) for a particular saved search.

FND_SEARCH_ATTACH_CONT.description: Table for storing ContentTypes and their configuration for OSCS crawling.

FND_SEARCH_OPTIONS_B.description: The primary table storing Fusion Search Options.  These options are passed to Oracle Fusion Search (Global Search) at runtime.

FND_SEARCH_OPTIONS_TL.description:
Stores Translatable attributes for Fusion Search Options.
These options are passed to Oracle Fusion Search (Global Search) at runtime.

FND_SEARCH_SMART_METADATA.description: Registration of Applcore Smart Searches for OSCS Search Service and the Smart Search UI.

FND_SEARCH_TEMPLATE.description: Registration of Applcore Index templates for OSCS Search Service and the Smart Search UI.

FND_SEARCH_VIEW_OPTIONS.description: A Mapping table that identifies the GlobalSearchOptions for a given View Id.

FND_SEED_OBJ_MAP_GT.description: Global Temporary Table used during bulk seed SQL processing. Oracle internal use only.

FND_SESSIONS.description: This table contains the sessions that are created when users sign into the applications.  It is meant for internal use only.

FND_SESSION_ATTRIBUTES.description: This table contains information about the attributes of the sessions stored in the parent sessions table, for example the session language or the current timezone.  It is a child table of FND_SESSIONS.  It is meant for internal use only.

FND_SESSION_ATTRIBUTE_SETS.description: This table groups combinations of attributes that are commonly used by users into sets.  This grouping is done for performance reasons and this table is meant for internal use only.

FND_SESSION_NAMESPACES.description: This table contains the namespaces of the sessions stored in the parent sessions table.  Each namespace groups related attributes, for example there is a security namespace for security attributes.  It is a child table of FND_SESSIONS.  It is meant for internal use only.

FND_SESSION_ROLE_SETS.description: This table contains combinations of roles formed as sets, which are associated with users who have signed into the applications.  Grouping is done for performance related reasons and this table is meant for internal use only.

FND_SESSION_TEMPLATES.description: This table contains templates for the sessions that are created when users sign into the applications.  It is meant for internal use only.

FND_SESSION_USERS.description: This table contains the user name and user ID of every user that has signed into the applications.  It is meant for internal use only.

FND_SESSION_USER_ACTIVITY.description: This table tracks UI activity for the given user.

FND_SETID_ASSIGNMENTS.description: This table contains details of the reference data sets that are assigned to reference groups, based on the parameters determinant value and determinant type.

FND_SETID_REFERENCE_ENTITIES.description: The FND_SETID_REFERENCE_ENTITIES table captures all reference entities in each reference group.

FND_SETID_REFERENCE_GROUPS_B.description: The FND_SETID_REFERENCE_GROUPS_B table captures the default determinant type for all reference entities in each reference group.

FND_SETID_REFERENCE_GROUPS_TL.description: This table contains the translations of all reference groups stored in REFERENCE_GROUP_NAME.

FND_SETID_SETS.description: This table contains reference data sets that are shared across organizations, Reference data sets comprise data that is commonly used across organizations or business units.

FND_SETUP_DATA_ACTIONS.description: This table stores the rules for certain actions and features.

FND_SP_SUGGESTIONS.description:
Suggestions Service is a Helidon MP based Smart Platform micro service being developed as part of Saas-infra . It provides APIs to allows the sync client to synchronize the suggestions data at the client end with the database. This suggestion data is used in the VB application by smart platform to render personalization for specific user.

The table FND_SP_SUGGESTIONS is used as a persistence layer where data will flow in through the spectra ucpwrapper which acts as a data source.

FND_SUGGEST_GROUPS_B.description: Definition of Search Suggest Groups as used by Global Search.

FND_SUGGEST_GROUPS_TL.description:
Stores Translatable attributes for Fusion Suggest Groups.
These options are passed to Oracle Fusion Search (Global Search) at runtime.

FND_SYNONYMS_B.description: The primary table for storing Fusion Synonyms.

FND_SYNONYMS_TL.description: The primary table for storing Fusion Synonyms.

FND_TABLE_DATASHAPES.description: This table will be used to maintain the Table level Datashape Info for all Fusion Tables. It will store the current Datashape Info (Actual) which will be automatically populated by a script and also the Target Datashape Info to be populated by the Table Owners based on their requirements. The goal is to match both Target and Actual values.

FND_TREE.description: This table holds Trees details for managing trees.

FND_TREE_AUDIT_JOB.description: Stores information for Auditing of Trees scheduldedas batch mode job.

FND_TREE_DATA_SOURCE_PARAMS.description: This table holds values for Tree Structure Data Source Parameters for a specific Tree.

FND_TREE_FLATTENING_HISTORY.description: This table holds records of tree flattening history.

FND_TREE_LABEL.description: Th table holds Tree Labels i.e., Labels associated with a specific Tree.

FND_TREE_LOG.description: This table holds records of tree node operations.

FND_TREE_LOG_PARAMS.description: This table holds parameters for each tree node operation entry.

FND_TREE_NODE.description: This table holds the nodes of trees.

FND_TREE_NODE_CF.description: This table holds column flattened Tree Nodes.

FND_TREE_NODE_RF.description: This table holds row flattened representations of Tree Nodes.

FND_TREE_STRUCTURE.description: This table defines a Tree Structure.

FND_TREE_STRUCTURE_TL.description: This table holds translatable attributes of Tree Structures.

FND_TREE_TL.description: This table holds the translatable attributes of Trees.

FND_TREE_VERSION_AUDIT_RES.description: Tree Version Audit Resoult storage for batch mode auditing of tree versions.

FND_TREE_VERSION_AUDIT_RES_TL.description: Translatable information for tree version audit result table.

FND_TREE_VERSION_TL.description: This table holds translatable attributes of Tree Versions.

FND_TS_DATA_SOURCE.description: This table describes a Tree Structure Data Source.

FND_TS_DATA_SOURCE_PARAMS.description: This table stores Tree Structure Data Source Parameters (if any).

FND_TS_DATA_SOURCE_REL.description: This table holds the relationships between Tree Structure Data Sources.

FND_TS_DATA_SOURCE_TL.description: This table holds translatable information for  Data Source.

FND_USER_ROLES_ASSOCIATION.description: Table for storing one record for each Role Membership that the user has been provisioned in LDAP.
